systems.system_notes: Mobile-bearing total ankle arthroplasty platform for end-stage ankle arthritis with a three-component construct.

trays.tray_notes: Official STAR materials reference the surgical technique and dedicated ankle replacement instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official STAR materials describe the tibial implant as part of the mobile-bearing construct.
Official STAR materials describe the talar implant as part of the three-component ankle replacement.
Official STAR materials describe the mobile-bearing polyethylene component within the system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official STAR pages define the three-component ankle replacement construct but this pass does not expose a public implant code table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
